LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS LAURA GREENBERG AND SHERRY GENDELMAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE TENDER WAS NOT ACCEPTED AND THE REASON IT WAS NOT WAS NEITHER ARBITRARY NOR CAPRICIOUS. THE TENDER DID NOT DISCHARGE THE DEBT. C.C. 1500. THE TENDER SIMPLY PROVIDED DEFENDANTS WITH A DEFENSE TO AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION FOR NON-PAYMENT OF RENT. SEE RANDOL V TATUM (1893) 98 CAL 390, 398-99. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
